Here is a simple Plant UML diagram that shows two different types of nodes:

    Node 1 --> Node 2
     ---+---
     ---+---
     ---+---

    Node 1 --> Node 3
    ---+---

    Node 2 --> Node 4
  ---+---

  Node 3 --> Node 5
  ---+---
```
This diagram shows two different types of nodes: One is a simple node with no tags, and the other one is a more complex node with multiple tags.
